meta.name: club-website
meta.description: Club website starter using the Polaris Flex theme
meta.useCaseDescription: A starter skeleton for student organizations or clubs with events, blog, and contact sections.

items.title: Welcome to Roaring Readers
items.content:
Book Club

Where Every Page Turns Into a Conversation

Join a community of readers dedicated to exploring new worlds, one chapter at a time.

Our Mission

To foster a diverse and inclusive community of lifelong learners who find joy in the written word. We believe that sharing stories builds empathy, sparks curiosity, and connects us across different walks of life.

items.title: About the Club
items.content:
Roaring Readers

Founded in 2005, Roaring Readers began as a small gathering of friends in a local coffee shop. Today, we are a thriving digital and physical hub for book worms. We don’t just read books; we dissect themes, challenge perspectives, and celebrate the impact of literature on our daily lives.

Whether you read one book a year or one a week, there is a seat at our table for you.

items.title: Events & Meetings
items.content:
Events & Meetings

  • Monthly Meetup
    • Where: Paterno Library and Zoom
    • When: Every third Thursday at 7:00 PM

Events:

  • Guest Author Q&A: Live session with featured authors
  • Annual Book Swap: Summer picnic exchange
  • Literary Trivia Night: Team-based competition

items.title: Blogs
items.content:
✍️ Blog: The Bookworm’s Ledger

  • DNF Corner: Honest reviews of unfinished books
  • Member Spotlight: Monthly interviews
  • Local Bookstore Tours: Hidden gems in the city
  • Top 5 Lists: Curated reading lists

items.title: Join & Contact
items.content:
Join & Contact

Have a book recommendation or a question? We’d love to hear from you.

  • Location: HUB-Robeson Center, Suite 204
  • Phone: (814) 555-2732
  • Email: hello@bluewhitereadpsu.org
  • Office Hours: Tue & Thu, 2–4 PM

Ready to start your next chapter?
